channel.title: HoldLens — What to sell (Q4 2025)
channel.description: Top sell signals from the best portfolio managers in the world — ranked by HoldLens's exit-share + dump-severity model. Updated every 13F filing deadline.

item.title: META sell signal — 85/100 · 5 managers selling
item.description: Chris Hohn, Chuck Akre, Terry Smith, David Tepper, Polen Capital are selling META (Meta Platforms) this quarter. Multi-factor sell-signal score: 85/100. Seller list with quality: Chris Hohn (Q9), Chuck Akre (Q9), Terry Smith (Q9), David Tepper (Q9), Polen Capital (Q8).

item.title: AAPL sell signal — 41/100 · 2 managers selling
item.description: Warren Buffett, David Rolfe are selling AAPL (Apple Inc.) this quarter. Multi-factor sell-signal score: 41/100. Seller list with quality: Warren Buffett (Q10), David Rolfe (Q9).

item.title: NVDA sell signal — 41/100 · 2 managers selling
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller, Chase Coleman are selling NVDA (NVIDIA) this quarter. Multi-factor sell-signal score: 41/100. Seller list with quality: Stanley Druckenmiller (Q9), Chase Coleman (Q8).

item.title: MSFT sell signal — 39/100 · 2 managers selling
item.description: Stanley Druckenmiller, William von Mueffling are selling MSFT (Microsoft) this quarter. Multi-factor sell-signal score: 39/100. Seller list with quality: Stanley Druckenmiller (Q9), William von Mueffling (Q8).

item.title: BAC sell signal — 21/100 · 1 managers selling
item.description: Warren Buffett is selling BAC (Bank of America) this quarter. Multi-factor sell-signal score: 21/100. Seller list with quality: Warren Buffett (Q10).

item.title: WBD sell signal — 20/100 · 1 managers selling
item.description: Seth Klarman is selling WBD (Warner Bros. Discovery) this quarter. Multi-factor sell-signal score: 20/100. Seller list with quality: Seth Klarman (Q9).
